context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 validated all requested features: (1) Auth login works with lowercased email format (ctyler.gm@slmco.local), (2) Dashboard/Overview page loads without errors after login, (3) Standards Library page loads with carousel of library items and toggle sections for Authoring and Equipment Records, (4) Equipment logs API endpoint /api/equipment-logs returns paginated results, (5) Repeat Offenders page loads with threshold explanation description (3/5/7 levels), (6) Crew portal /crew/{code} loads with icon tabs (Camera/BookOpen/Wrench for Capture/Standards/Equipment), (7) Rapid Review page loads correctly showing empty queue state, (8) Quick Matrix Ref toggle on dashboard opens/closes correctly with division filter, (9) Login page shows Admin/Crew split tabs. All previous features continue to work.

dashboard_overview.stats_visible: PASS - submissions, jobs, owner queue, export ready
